Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}You just don't know when to give up, do ya?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I'll come back as many times as I need to. I don't give up that easy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}And my answer will be the same every time: I'm not going back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Actually, we got a new team member. Did you know animals can use Personas too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}He's a dog. He lost his master to the Shadows six months ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}And he's incredibly loyal too... Up until now, he's been guarding the spot where his master was killed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}It's been rough for him, but he's making the most of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Who's he talking to? I wouldn't want to butt in...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}We saw someone die right before our eyes, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It'll be two years, this October...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}How long are you gonna beat yourself up over that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}That's why you're always behind the station, even though you don't actually hang out with anyone there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It was my fault, and nothing's ever gonna change that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}What does it matter if I come to terms with it? It won't change the past.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}This isn't like it was with your sister... What happened to Miki was different.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I just want to forget it ever happened.[n]{f 1 1}
